subcodes.title: Words to Alma Albertson et al, spoken on 1900-11-24
subcodes.first_line: In this morning's lesson we explained redemption. The self-sacrifice of Jesus cause those who believed in Him to have eternal life.... The mystery of it is explained in four ways.
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @sacrifice of the Manifestation of God redeems the world, @return of the Manifestations of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @station of the Manifestation of God, @spiritual transformation
